title: Record: Order-Adaptive BackoffMixer (mean val_bpb=0.5440)
body:
## Results

| Seed | val_bpb | Eval time |
|------|---------|-----------|
| 42   | 0.5437  | ~391s     |
| 1337 | 0.5450  | ~391s     |
| 2024 | 0.5434  | ~391s     |
| **Mean** | **0.5440** |           |
| Std  | 0.0008  |           |

- Artifact: ~16.0 MB
- Train: 600s on 8xH100 SXM
- Eval: ~391s (well under 600s)

## Method

11-layer transformer (512d, 8/8 full MHA, XSA-all, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, 3.5x MLP). Order-adaptive entropy-gated BackoffNgramMixer with per-order entropy thresholds. Score-first, backward-looking, deterministic.

## Acknowledgments

Huge thanks to the incredible community that made this possible:

- @abaybektursun (PR #549) — base architecture + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon
- @deanbrr (PR #659, #779) — invented the n-gram eval cache for this competition, BackoffNgramMixer
- @Asukabot0 (PR #715, #727) — XSA-all concept, entropy-adaptive alpha formula
- @gowtham0992 (PR #606) — int5 + Soft-Round QAT
- @signalrush (PR #414) — EMA training recipe
- @sofiabod (PR #518) — LeakyReLU activation
- @thwu1 (PR #180) — mixed quantization, BigramHash, SmearGate
- @RoyiRa (PR #700) — TTT framework
- @Christopher-Lee-McClendon (PR #461) — TTT recipe
- @raahilshah (PR #162) — int6 quantization

This competition has been an amazing collaborative experience. Every improvement here builds on ideas shared openly.

- [x] 8xH100 SXM, train <=600s
- [x] Eval <=600s (391s)
- [x] Artifact <=16MB
- [x] 3-seed validation (std 0.0008)
